summary: Branding and Internationalization Testing - All 12 features tested and working. Login page has house-palm background, logo badge, and language switcher with 3 languages (EN/PT/ES). Dashboard sidebar uses brand color #A2182C with logo icon. Language switching works across all pages with localStorage persistence. Favicon updated to Red Ribbon icon.

issues: Page title 'Users' is hardcoded in English instead of using translation hook t('users.title'). Sidebar navigation IS translated correctly.

passed_tests: Login page shows house-in-palm background image (backgroundImage: url(/assets/logos/house-palm.jpg))
Login page displays Red Ribbon logo badge (logo-badge.jpg with border-4 border-[#A2182C])
Language switcher visible on login page (data-testid='language-switcher')
Language switcher has 3 options: English (🇺🇸), Portuguese (🇧🇷), Spanish (🇪🇸)
Selecting Portuguese changes login text: 'Bem-vindo de Volta', 'E-mail', 'Senha', 'Entrar'
Selecting Spanish changes login text: 'Bienvenido de Nuevo', 'Correo electrónico', 'Contraseña', 'Iniciar Sesión'
Dashboard sidebar uses brand primary color #A2182C (verified: rgb(162, 24, 44))
Dashboard header has compact language switcher (data-testid='language-switcher-compact')
Sidebar shows Red Ribbon logo icon (logo-icon.jpg)
Forgot Password page has same branding: house-palm background, logo badge, language switcher
Language preference persists after navigation (localStorage.getItem('language') = selected language)
Favicon updated to Red Ribbon icon (/assets/logos/logo-icon.jpg in index.html)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add useTranslation hook to Users.js page to translate page title from 'Users' to t('users.title')
critical_code_review_comments: i18n implementation using i18next with 3 locale files (en.json, pt.json, es.json) - comprehensive translations
LanguageSwitcher component supports both 'default' and 'compact' variants for login vs dashboard
Language preference stored in localStorage and loaded on app init via i18n.js
Brand colors correctly applied: Primary #A2182C, Secondary #97662D, Accent #AEC6C8
Logo assets properly organized in /public/assets/logos/: house-palm.jpg, logo-badge.jpg, logo-icon.jpg, logo-full.jpg
Favicon correctly set in index.html with theme-color meta tag matching brand primary
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branding and i18n fully functional. Brand assets in /public/assets/logos/. i18n uses i18next with localStorage persistence. Test credentials: admin@redribbonops.com / Fmtvvl171**. SMTP is MOCKED.

login_page_branding.logo_badge: Working - logo-badge.jpg with brand color border

dashboard_branding.header_language_switcher: Working - compact variant with globe icon

internationalization.persistence: Working - stored in localStorage, persists across navigation
